description_for_human: X-Ops Conference - DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps & MLOps conference in Madrid, Spain.
description_for_model: Use this plugin to get information about X-Ops Conference: event dates, speakers, agenda, sponsorship packages, startup pack, and registration. The event focuses on DevOps, DevSecOps, AIOps, MLOps, Platform Engineering, SRE, and Cybersecurity.
